ownership.availabilityExpectation: The pinned commit and its protected files remain publicly retrievable for the lifetime of the ContractScribe M0.7 evidence instance.

independence.commonalityReason: The frozen runner requires the SampleApp/SampleLibrary two-project envelope and one SampleApp-to-SampleLibrary reference.

preRunReview.reviewBasis: Source declarations and the complete oracle were reviewed as newly authored synthetic material before the first selected-baseline execution; no M0.4 source, oracle, private path, credential, log, prompt, or downstream identifier was used.

oracle.correctionRule: A correction or supersession creates a new immutable fixture commit and evidence instance; the pinned oracle is never edited in place and never replaced from runner output.

protectedFilesNote: The fixture-manifest.json self-hash is recorded by the consumer manifest because including a manifest hash inside itself would be circular.
offlineExecutionBeginsAfter: The fixture restore and build have completed and the already-built ContractScribe host is ready.
